text.content: woke up to the sound of trucks reversing and people putting wax on surfboards.

text.content: Feel great about saving money on accommodation. Feeling less enthusiastic about not having any toothpaste. Mustered you the courage to put clothes on and go to the bathroom.

text.content: 😷  Here is the moon. It’s eyes, nose and mouth, correct?

text.content: I’m so excited to leave Jbay. After passing through the 5 way stop street all the warm feelings for that town dissipate all too quickly and I beeline for Cape St Francis.

text.content: trying to find somewhere to sleep for the night

text.content: Kaching! Water berry park in st francis has a camp site. 1953# is the gate code.

text.content: repacked the car. Feeling like I’m going to get it more right over the next few weeks though

text.content: On the menu for tonight is baked beans and lentils cup a snack

text.content: I am warmly greeted by some dogs. They realize I’m not going to share so they leave.

text.content: Feeling quite fantastic in general. I cannot believe that this is going to be the tone of my life for the next few months.

text.content: I begin thinking of where to go next. Hogsback and East London are definitely on the list.

text.content: I fully indent to finish “Jozi Jordan” tonight, but there’s no signal and my laptop is dead. So I make a cup of rooibos, eat a rush and go to bed happy and exhausted.
